hops.context: The camera images are inputs to a convolutional neural network computer vision model, which enables closed-loop control and corrects actuation imperfections during autonomous operations
Processor: A Bluetooth-enabled micro-controller (Seeeduino XIAO nRF52840) for processing the computer vision model
on-board convolutional neural network (CNN) based computer vision program is integrated

question: In the robot design described, which component primarily handles the transmission of camera image data to the convolutional neural network for processing?

options.A: The JPEGCamera sends data directly to the convolutional neural network, bypassing any micro-controller.
options.B: The on-board convolutional neural network directly receives data from the JPEGCamera without intermediary processing.
options.C: A separate dedicated image processing unit is responsible for transmitting data to the convolutional neural network.
options.D: A Bluetooth-enabled micro-controller processes the data before it reaches the convolutional neural network.

explanation: According to the knowledge path, the JPEGCamera sends data to the BluetoothMicroController, which then processes this data before it is handled by the OnBoardCNN. Hence, the Bluetooth-enabled micro-controller is the component that primarily handles the transmission and initial processing of the camera image data.
